title: Research LilyGO built-in UI visual reference for Python TUI
description: Why this exists: the TUI visual target is 'as much as possible like the LilyGO built-in UI', but the exact device UI, screenshots, interaction model, colors, iconography, and licensing constraints need to be captured before implementation. What needs to be done: identify the relevant LilyGO firmware/UI being emulated, collect source references such as screenshots, videos, firmware docs, or code where available, summarize screen structure, status indicators, navigation model, message list behavior, compose flow, and constraints for terminal approximation. Acceptance criteria: reference device/firmware is named; source links or local source paths are recorded; key screens and visual motifs are summarized; any asset/license limits are noted; terminal approximation rules are captured for implementers.
